1.description: get Trondheim kommunenummer, geometry (omrade) and centroid

2.description: inspect quick-clay risk class identifiers in skredrisikokvikkleireklasse

3.description: select quick-clay hazard polygons (utlosningomr) filtered by the high risk class identifier

4.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality with their geometry and IDs

5.description: reduce hazard polygons to those intersecting Trondheim municipality geometry

6.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced hazard polygons

7.description: compute distance from those buildings to the municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance_m) as distance_m

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim%' LIMIT 1;
